productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Navy Blue CC Sports Shoes
description: Style NoteFeaturing Clima Cool technology, this CC Solution shoe from adidas comes in a sleek design but is packed with great features. A runner's dream shoe, this shoe is designed to wick sweat away and external water to seep out. Ultra breathable running shoes - buy now before stocks run out!Product DetailsNavy blue mesh upper with blue synthetic overlaysThin padded mesh inner, has central lace-upsThick rubber midsole with supports (elevated at the heel region)TPU outsole with waffle patterned lugs that have mini suction points insideMaterial and CareSynthetic, meshWipe with clean dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
